title: festuca ovina subsp. rubra
intro: Festuca ovina subsp. rubra, also known as the red fescue, is a subspecies of the fescue grass that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The red fescue has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the red fescue is often used as a tea or tincture, and it is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal blends.
